name: REAL WORKFLOW 1 - CRM Supplier Rate Extraction v1

nodes.name: IF - PDF Is Ready For Gemini

parameters.content:
## Configure credentials

Inbound Header Auth: Authorization = Bearer N8N_RATE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Gemini Header Auth: x-goog-api-key. Callback Header Auth: Authorization = Bearer N8N_RATE_CALLBACK_SECRET.

## Publication boundary

This workflow extracts only. It cannot activate rates. The CRM callback stages inactive rows; an administrator must review and publish them before the website can use them.

main.node: IF - PDF Is Ready For Gemini
